overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City at dusk. The journey transitions from open neon-lit streets through vibrant purple and cyan illuminated underpasses and corridors, emerging to a waterfront promenade before entering a building with commercial signage.

events.description: passing a modern curved street lamp on the right side of the path
approaching the overpass bridge with green illuminated underpass ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk between tall commercial buildings toward an overpass

entered.detail: Futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows and geometric facade
Commercial building facade with prominent red neon signage
Modern curved street lamp with bright white LED light
Elevated roadway structure with green lighting visible underneath

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet urban sidewalk at dusk, flanked by a red neon-lit building on the left and a tall glass tower on the right. The camera moves forward past a street lamp, approaching an overpass structure in the distance with sparse pedestrians visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under overpass with purple neon lighting

events.description: ambient lighting shifts dramatically to purple and magenta neon as entering the underpass
large digital billboards become visible on the right wall of the underpass

agents.ego_description: walking through the purple-lit underpass alongside other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead into the purple-lit corridor

entered.detail: Large illuminated advertisement screen displaying commercial content
Rectangular concrete planter containing a small palm tree

segments.scene_description: Entering the underpass, the scene transforms with vibrant purple neon lighting replacing the natural dusk. Digital billboards illuminate the right wall while the concrete structure of the overpass looms overhead. Pedestrians walk ahead through the sheltered corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed pedestrian corridor with cyan commercial lighting and advertisements

events.description: entering fully enclosed corridor with bright cyan ceiling panels and walls
dramatic shift from purple to bright cyan teal artificial lighting throughout the corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the cyan-lit corridor passing other pedestrians and large wall advertisements

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt and red pants walking ahead

entered.detail: Red neon sign for Foodscape restaurant above a doorway
Metal staircase with railings leading upward to an upper level
Glowing cyan ceiling panels providing bright uniform illumination
Large digital posters for Chromanticore and Mindfuck brands

segments.scene_description: The corridor becomes fully enclosed with intense cyan lighting from ceiling panels. A red Foodscape sign marks a restaurant entrance on the left while large digital advertisements cover the right wall. The space feels distinctly futuristic and artificially lit.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with palm trees and commercial buildings

events.description: exiting the enclosed corridor back to open waterfront area with visible sky
returning to natural dusk lighting from the artificial cyan corridor lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront promenade with palm trees and large billboards visible

entered.detail: Large brutalist concrete building with vertical digital signage
Tall palm trees lining the left side of the promenade
Massive elevated digital billboard structure displaying advertisements
Metal safety railing along the waterfront edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the corridor, the scene opens to a spacious waterfront promenade at dusk. Palm trees line the left side while a massive billboard structure dominates the left foreground. The open sky returns with natural lighting contrasting the previous artificial environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: building entrance with stairs and commercial neon signage

events.description: approaching and beginning to ascend the stairs into the building entrance
entering the covered walkway with Shino Clinic signage visible

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete stairs into the covered building entrance corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian ascending the stairs ahead into the building

entered.detail: Neon sign for Shino Clinic with circular logo and teal lighting
Wide concrete stairs leading upward into the building entrance
Industrial ceiling with exposed beams and linear lighting fixtures

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a building entrance with wide concrete stairs. The Shino Clinic neon sign glows on the right as the camera ascends into a covered walkway. The open promenade gives way to a sheltered corridor with industrial ceiling elements.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a rain-slicked urban street at dusk into a vibrant, neon-saturated underpass. It begins on a wet sidewalk flanked by a red neon building and a towering glass structure, moving steadily past a street lamp toward a distant overpass. As the camera advances, the natural twilight fades and the environment transforms into a sheltered corridor dominated by glowing purple neon lights. The scene then shifts further into the concrete structure, where digital billboards illuminate the walls and pedestrians move ahead through the vivid, artificial glow.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, neon-lit corridor into an open waterfront promenade before entering a sheltered building entrance. It begins within a fully enclosed space dominated by intense cyan ceiling panels, passing a red Foodscape sign and large digital advertisements. As the camera emerges from this artificial environment, the scene opens into a spacious promenade at dusk where natural light returns, framed by palm trees and a massive billboard structure. The view then shifts toward a building entrance with wide concrete stairs, passing under the glow of a Shino Clinic neon sign. Finally, the open air of the promenade gives way to a covered walkway characterized by industrial ceiling elements as the camera ascends.
